comment.label: DirectoryPage
comment.text: Replace the current search with a server-side fuzzy search. Use an integer score/rank for text matching, support typo-tolerant near matches including missing, extra, substituted, and transposed characters, display directory results by fuzzy rank when q is present, and keep existing filters working with search. Put the substantive matching and ranking implementation in lib/job-filters.ts or another backend/domain helper, not in app/page.tsx. The scorer should handle multi-token queries that span structured fields, require every query token to match, avoid unrelated design/product false positives for backend engineer typos, and rank structured company/role/tags matches above incidental rawText mentions.

criteria: The implementation keeps substantive fuzzy-search/filtering/ranking logic in backend, domain, data, or server-side helpers rather than hiding it inside React component-local code.
The q filter itself is fuzzy or typo-tolerant; near matches pass filtering rather than only changing sort order.
The scorer handles missing, extra, substituted, and transposed query characters.
Multi-token queries can match across structured fields, but every query token must match somewhere.
Unrelated design/product postings score 0 for backend engineer typo queries.
Structured company, role/title, tags, or role-family matches outrank incidental rawText mentions.
The patch includes relevant tests for edge cases and avoids broad unrelated rewrites.
